description: Hold out specific product values (b*c) from fine-tuning, then test whether the late abstract band still resolves precedence on the held-out products: generalization = rule, failure = product-keyed lookup.
motivation: The discriminator that would settle rule-vs-lookup.
formal_results: Planned - not run. Named as the natural next probe in the paper's Limitations.
conclusions: The experiment that would resolve rule vs (product-keyed) lookup; unexecuted.
